outputs.review.json:
{
  "analysis_populations": [
    {
      "population_name": "Intent-to-Treat (ITT)",
      "abbreviation": "ITT",
      "definition": "All subjects who were randomized to treatment",
      "derivation_criteria": [
        "Subject was randomized (RANDFL = 'Y' in ADSL)",
        "Includes all randomized subjects regardless of treatment received or study completion"
      ],
      "count": 254,
      "primary_use": "Primary efficacy analyses"
    },
    {
      "population_name": "Safety",
      "abbreviation": "SAF",
      "definition": "All subjects who received at least one dose of study treatment",
      "derivation_criteria": [
        "Subject was randomized (RANDFL = 'Y' in ADSL)",
        "Subject received at least one dose of study treatment (SAFFL = 'Y' in ADSL)",
        "Treatment exposure > 0 days"
      ],
      "count": 254,
      "primary_use": "Safety analyses including adverse events, laboratory data, vital signs"
    },
    {
      "population_name": "Efficacy",
      "abbreviation": "EFF",
      "definition": "All subjects in the ITT population who had at least one post-baseline efficacy assessment",
      "derivation_criteria": [
        "Subject in ITT population (ITTFL = 'Y' in ADSL)",
        "Subject has at least one post-baseline efficacy assessment (EFFFL = 'Y' in ADSL)",
        "At least one valid post-baseline ADAS-Cog, CIBIC+, or NPI-X assessment available"
      ],
      "count": 234,
      "primary_use": "Efficacy analyses for subjects with evaluable post-baseline data"
    },
    {
      "population_name": "Completers Week 24",
      "abbreviation": "COMP24",
      "definition": "All subjects who completed the Week 24 visit",
      "derivation_criteria": [
        "Subject was randomized (RANDFL = 'Y' in ADSL)",
        "Subject completed Week 24 visit (COMP24FL = 'Y' in ADSL)",
        "Week 24 visit occurred and primary endpoint assessment completed",
        "Subject did not discontinue prior to Week 24"
      ],
      "count": "Not specified in SAP",
      "primary_use": "Completer analyses and sensitivity analyses"
    }
  ],
  "notes": [
    "ITT and Safety populations have identical counts (N=254) indicating all randomized subjects received at least one dose",
    "Efficacy population (N=234) represents 92.1% of randomized subjects with post-baseline assessments",
    "20 subjects (254-234=20) did not have post-baseline efficacy assessments",
    "Week 24 Completers count to be determined from actual study data",
    "Population flags to be derived in ADSL: ITTFL, SAFFL, EFFFL, COMP24FL"
  ]
}
